nasb.text: Paul said to the centurion and to the soldiers, “Unless these men remain in the ship, you yourselves cannot be saved.”

esv.text: Paul said to the centurion and the soldiers, “Unless these men stay in the ship, you cannot be saved.”

cnv.text: 保羅對百夫長和士兵說：“這些人若不留在船上，你們就性命難保！”

ccb.text: 保罗对百夫长和士兵们说：“除非他们留下来，否则你们都活不了！”

csbs.text: 保罗对百夫长和士兵们说：“这些人如果不留在船上，你们就不能获救。”
